author: Shakil281
name: Depth Recurrence + SwiGLU + Mixed Quantization
blurb: Non-record experimental submission exploring three novel architectural modifications on top of the PR #549 stack: (1) depth recurrence — loop N unique layers K times for K*N effective depth with shared weights, reducing parameter count while increasing representational depth; (2) SwiGLU gated activation replacing LeakyReLU², using gated linear units with SiLU for improved gradient flow and expressivity; (3) mixed int5/int6 per-layer quantization for tighter compression. Built on the LeakyReLU + TTT + Parallel Muon stack. Untested on 8xH100 — submitted as architectural proposal pending compute access.
